summary: Audience recording captures a strong pre‑drums segment with stellar Eyes of the World, Estimated Prophet and Terrapin Station jams.
review: The audience tape is noted as a significant step up from previous AUD sources, delivering clear ambience while preserving the energy of the night. Reviewers highlight the long, well‑paced Eyes of the World, an inspired Estimated Prophet jam, and a seamless transition into a sublime Terrapin Station that even made it onto the So Many Roads box set.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed positive review praises both performance and recording, indicating a strong show with an improved audience capture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Improved audience tape compared to earlier sources; clear enough to enjoy the music while retaining live ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Pre‑drums segment highlighted; long, well‑paced Eyes leading into a great Estimated Prophet jam and seamless transition to Terrapin Station.
